description: As Whitehall taunts Cal and prepares to experiment on Skye, Coulson bursts in and fatally shoots Whitehall before Cal can take his revenge. Cal, robbed of his vengeance, attacks Coulson in a rage. Meanwhile, Ward attempts to talk his way free, is released, and begins to help Skye escape. Skye stops her father from killing Coulson and tells him to leave, leading to a charged emotional farewell in which Cal calls his daughter "Daisy" and urges her to embrace her destiny.

transcript.line: Oh, good. You're awake.
I've waited years for this.
Do you know what your mother's special gift was?

She didn't age. At least, not like the rest of us. I wonder if that's your gift, as well, or if you're special in another way. Discovery requires experimentation. I killed your wife. And before I kill you, I want you to watch what I do to your daughter. Stay here.
Yes, sir.
Know what we could use?
Another 50 men?
I was gonna say a dozen. But I like your idea better. Okay, here we go.
These tunnels are older than the pyramids, yet we may be the first humans to ever set foot in them.
I'm much more interested in us being the last.
Left at this intersection.
Copy that.

Hey. Hear that? They're coming for us. I saw how many guys you have on your side. You are sorely outnumbered, my friend. Tell you what. Let me go now. I'll tell them take it easy on you. Maybe cut off an ear, pop an eye.
Shut up.
Just trying to be helpful. I'm a lot nicer than he's gonna be. You're welcome. Now, let's get out of here.
Yeah, me, too! Come on!
It's safer here. And I'm about to do something to Whitehall. I don't want you to see me like that.
I don't mind... Seeing. Hell, I'm happy to help.
No. I get to do this myself.
What? Hey!
Two down, two to go.
What's wrong?
This is taking a little longer than I'd hoped.
We'll have to move more quickly.
We should split up.
Bad idea.
No, it's a good idea. We're running out of time. I'm familiar with the explosives. I have a map. I'll see you two at the Garrison.
Fitz.
Just trust me on this, Jemma. I'm not afraid. I can do it.
Fitz.
Yeah. Other direction.
Take a team and sweep this place floor by floor.
What did you do?!
You're welcome?
You killed him! He was mine, and you killed him!
I'll do the same to you if you even move. There's no way I'm letting you take Skye into those tunnels to trigger whatever Armageddon you believe in.
You had no right to do that, to take that from me!
I know, in some insane way, you love your daughter, but I will kill you if you take another step. Now, where's the Obelisk?
You can't stop this.
Join S.H.I.E.L.D. Travel to exotic, distant lands. Meet exciting, unusual people... and kill them.
Ohh! We both want to help your daughter.
She doesn't need you. She needs me. I'm her father, not you!
I'm sorry your little family reunion didn't go as planned. The least I can do is get you out of here. Sit down while I check the door.
Never turn your back on the enemy. You taught me that.
You took everything!
Stop it! Stop it or I'll shoot! Dad!
He took something from me.
No. He saved you from killing more people. Now, get up and get away from him.
You have to finish what we started.
No, I don't. I'm not going down there. I'm not gonna change or transform or whatever the hell you think is gonna happen.
Why can't you see it's a good thing?

Maybe it's all the dead bodies laying around or the fact that Hydra wants it. I'm gonna make sure the Obelisk never gets down into that city. And you're gonna leave. This is your one chance to walk away, or I will kill you.
Okay. I'll go. But I'll be waiting for you. After you change, no one else will understand. They'll be afraid. Change is terrifying. But I'm your father, and I love you. I will always love you, Daisy.
I'm so sorry. I couldn't kill him. I couldn't kill him, and I wanted to and I couldn't. I'm so sorry. I'm gonna make it right. I'm gonna find the Obelisk.
I'm gonna stop the drill. I'm gonna make it right.
No, Skye. Skye, no. Don't go down there.
You here to finish me off?
So you're free.
Help me up. I can get us out of here. Then we'll figure it all out.
I'm going to find Coulson.
